Implementer decisions captured in report and to be adjudicated by Task 0011 verifier: (1) JobCount Option A — planner-supplied via Config.JobCount, persisted exactly, 0 means 'unknown'; (2) Resolver branch 3 (revision-key) on ErrNotFound FALLS THROUGH rather than bubbles, on the rationale that a regex-matching arg can also be a known named ref or legacy hash; only returns ErrAmbiguousArg if branches 4–7 also fail; (3) branch 5 length floor planShortHashLen=8 (shorter hex falls through to branch 7); (4) compat mirror writes .orun/plans/<hash>.json via CreateIfAbsent (ErrExists treated as idempotent success) and .orun/plans/latest.json via Write (last-write-wins per compatibility-and-migration.md §2); (5) typed sentinels ErrAmbiguousArg, ErrComponentRunUnchanged live in internal/revision/errors.go (resolver-shaped; no analogue at statestore byte layer).

Coverage on PR #158: internal/revision = 90.4 % (gate ≥ 90 %); internal/statestore = 96.1 % (M2 floor preserved). go test ./... and make test-state-redesign green; go mod tidy clean.
